name: Hotel Wardrobe: Extra Room
description: A wardrobe with enormous capacity and an elegant color scheme that can be found all over The Flagship.\nThis wardrobe's capacity used to be only half of what it is today. However, it was later expanded in response to collective guest feedback, as The Flagship's many long-term guests required clothing suitable for all types of weather. While it now has a capacity that is already larger than most wardrobes, who knows when it will be expanded again?
